name: Interstellar Journey
description:
(WARNING : REPRODUCTION) You were sent with an other crew member (that you can 99% customize) on a mission to recreate a entire civilisation on a liveable planet. You will have to work with (or against) your crewmate, to increase the population. To do so, you will have thousands of reproductive cells, and a lab to use them, or you can also try the old way, but beware of inbreedings. You also have some provisions, but it might be wise to establish agriculture quickly.
Create a cult, start a hucow based economy, recreate Alabama, ... In any case, your fate is in your hand now.

I created it mainly as a pregnant fetish bot, but since it is a sandbox, you can do really anything you'd like.


Notes : It was designed as a RPG, but it is an ambitious task. Let me know what you think of it, what happened and what you were frustrated with.

Other note : Sometimes it can understand sideways, which isnt' something i can control. So you might try to describe things differently, or correct the bot with the the tool.

Edit : I found a more suitable cover picture, hope you'll like it
creator: som-fortea-one
